---
# title 设置该页面显示的标题。
title: "Curriculum Vitae"
# CV 页面内容简洁，因此关闭右侧的本页目录。
toc: false
---

This page can contain either a concise web CV or a link to a PDF.

<!-- 链接指向 files/cv.pdf，并用 Quarto 的主按钮样式显示。 -->
[Download CV (PDF)](files/cv.pdf){.btn .btn-primary}

## Education

**Ph.D. in Mathematics**, University Name, expected year  
Advisor: Professor Name

## Research interests

Geometric analysis, geometric PDE, minimal surfaces, and related variational problems.

## Experience

Add research, teaching, seminar, and organizational experience here.

> Place your PDF at `files/cv.pdf` to activate the download button.
